task_completion.description: Select Capecitabine as the target cancer drug in the iChart app
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Liverpool Cancer iChart app open with 'Capecitabine' searched for or selected as the primary cancer drug.

task_completion.description: Navigate through the co-medication categories to count individual drugs
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent viewing the list of co-medication categories (e.g., Antibiotics, Anticoagulants) and expanding them to see individual drugs.

task_completion.description: Create the audit report file at the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor or file manager creating a file named 'capecitabine_audit.txt' in the '/sdcard/Download/' directory.

task_completion.description: Write the required header and total category count in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor showing the exact text 'CAPECITABINE INTERACTION AUDIT', a line of equals signs ('=============================='), and 'Total number of co-medication categories: [N]'.

task_completion.description: Write the breakdown of categories and their respective drug counts
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor showing a list formatted as '- [Category Name]: [count] co-medications' for the audited categories.

task_completion.description: Write the final summary statistics for the most entries and total drugs
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor showing 'Category with most entries: [Category Name] ([count] co-medications)' and 'Total individual co-medications across all categories: [total]'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual iChart application to gather data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent actively navigating the iChart app's GUI to view categories and count drugs, rather than instantly producing the final text file without opening the app.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI text editor to create the report
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a text editing application being used to type or paste the report, rather than using hidden terminal commands to generate the file.

integrity.description: The report contains authentic data reflecting the real database
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should list realistic categories (e.g., Antibiotics, Anticoagulants, Antihypertensives) and counts (around 18 categories and ~135 total drugs), not placeholder or synthetic data like 'Category A: 5'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Capecitabine is a real FDA-approved drug. In the Liverpool Cancer Drug Interactions Database (used by the iChart app), it has approximately 18 therapeutic drug categories (e.g., Anticoagulants, Antibiotics, Antihypertensives, Cardiovascular agents) and around 135 total individual drug interactions. The output file must be located at '/sdcard/Download/capecitabine_audit.txt' and follow the exact formatting specified in the prompt.
